acquisition method: Data-dependent acquisition was used in both RP and HILIC analysis
enrichment method: followed by HILIC enrichment of glycopeptides
fractionation method: analyzed using RP and HILIC chromatographic modes
instrument: coupled to a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: in the positive ionization mode for the top 20 most abundant precursor ions
labeling: the analysis of N-glycopeptides, showing increased glycoforms identifications using nanoHILIC-MS
reduction reagent: samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT
